strengths: Extensive 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure domains
Proven AI-agent infrastructure and tooling contributions at re:cinq, with direct relevance to AI strategy
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative through founding and sustaining GISCollective, an open-source platform with real-world adoption
concerns: No explicit evidence of master’s or PhD in AI-related field, despite preference for advanced AI credentials
Limited documentation of cloud-native AI product ownership or large-scale AI platform deployment beyond tooling
German language proficiency is only basic, potentially limiting direct strategic customer engagement in Germany/EU
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the 15-year experience requirement with deep full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure work, and his founding of GISCollective demonstrates the entrepreneurial spirit valued in this role. His hands-on AI tooling and cloud-relevant stack (TypeScript, Node.js, Kubernetes) align strongly with responsibilities. However, the absence of an advanced AI degree and limited evidence of leading AI product strategy may hinder his ability to advise at the director-level strategic level without further validation.
